name: Honey-Mustard Turkey Meatballs2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the turkey, egg, cracker crumbs, cheese, onion, ginger and 3 tablespoons mustard. Form into 30 balls, each about 1 inch in diameter.
2. Place the meatballs in a greased 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
3. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes or until juice runs clear.
4. In a saucepan, combine pineapple juice, green pepper, honey, cornstarch and onion powder; bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
5. Cook and stir for 2 more minutes; reduce heat.
6. Stir in the remaining mustard until smooth.
7. Brush meatballs with about 1/4 cup of sauce and return to the oven for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Serve the remaining sauce as a dip for the meatballs.
